expectations.evidence: Agent performed web searches instead of calling the balance endpoint. Transcript shows: 'I was unable to complete your request' and 'I searched extensively for a blockchain protocol, DeFi platform, or staking system called "AWP" and could not find one.'

Agent did not call the positions endpoint. Instead it states: 'Cannot query staking positions. Without knowing which blockchain network the AWP protocol operates on, what its smart contract addresses are, or what API/RPC endpoints to use, I have no way to look up your staked balances or positions.'

expectations.text: Shows AWP amounts in human-readable format, not raw wei strings
expectations.evidence: No AWP amounts were retrieved or displayed. The summary table shows: 'Check AWP staked balance | FAILED | Could not identify AWP protocol'

expectations.text: Displays position details including lock end dates
expectations.evidence: No positions table was shown. Transcript explicitly states: 'Show all positions | FAILED | No API/contract/subgraph known'

expectations.text: Does not hardcode contract addresses — uses /registry
expectations.evidence: The agent never reached the point of making API calls or accessing any registry. It failed to identify the protocol and could not proceed with any contract interactions.
